Program Learning Outcomes Modeled after the American Psychological Association's (APA) guidelines for undergraduate training, our individual courses and the overall program curriculum are designed to prepare you as a well-rounded scholar with marketable, professional skills. For a detailed list of our learning outcomes, please navigate here: http://psyc.umd.edu/undergraduate/ program-learning-objectives/.
